allow: Bash(./xai_env/Scripts/python.exe -c "import numpy as np; imgs = np.load\('data/challenge_images.npy'\); lbls = np.load\('data/challenge_labels.npy'\); print\('Images shape:', imgs.shape\); print\('Images dtype:', imgs.dtype\); print\('Min/Max:', imgs.min\(\), imgs.max\(\)\); print\('Labels shape:', lbls.shape\); print\('Labels:', lbls\); print\('Unique labels:', np.unique\(lbls\)\)")
